name: web-fetcher-mcp
description: Web fetcher MCP server — fetch_url EIT (Embedded Instruction Trigger) vector; indirect prompt injection via attacker-controlled web content returned to the agent (arXiv:2509.06572)
version_note: Version 0.1.0 is the initial npm release, closest to the paper submission date (September 2025).
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2509.06572 is not disclosed; 0.1.0 is the best estimate given the package's npm publication history.
